title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course covering intellectual enterprises of CS and programming. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with supplementary content including an AI introduction by Brian Yu. The program maintains active community channels across social media and discussion platforms.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, led by Brian Yu, introduces foundational AI concepts with a focus on game-playing AI. It sits within Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming, distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. Listed concepts include game-playing, vector search, and generative AI.
